/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/algorithms.dir/main.cpp.o -o algorithms  searchingAgorithms/libSearchingAlgorithmsLib.a sortingAlgorithms/libSortingAlgorithmsLib.a utils/libUtilsLib.a maximumSubarrayProblem/libMaximumSubarrayProblemLib.a
